page.title: Starlite 2028 Marbella: Yacht Charter Guide for Concert Nights

data.meta_description: Plan your Starlite 2028 Marbella yacht charter for concert nights. Private boats from Puerto Banús with skipper & drinks. Book your VIP transfer now.
data.summary: A practical guide to combining Starlite 2028 concerts with a private yacht charter from Puerto Banús. Includes fleet options, pricing, and logistics for a seamless VIP night out.
key_facts: Starlite 2028 runs July–August at Cantera de Nagüeles, Marbella.
Charter boats depart from Puerto Banús, 10–15 minutes by road from the venue.
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and IVA.
Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749 for 2 hours, €2,299 for 8 hours.
Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) from €4,719 for 4 hours, includes a jet ski.
Other boats (e.g. Ferretti 94, Canados 86) – pricing on request via WhatsApp.
Combine a sunset cruise with pre-concert drinks, then transfer to the concert.
Book early – Starlite nights sell out, especially for headline acts.

faq.q: How far is Puerto Banús from the Starlite venue?
faq.a: Puerto Banús is about 6 km from Cantera de Nagüeles, roughly 10–15 minutes by taxi or private transfer. Most charter boats dock at Puerto Banús, so you can enjoy a sunset cruise, then take a short ride to the concert.

faq.q: Can I charter a boat just for the afternoon before a Starlite concert?
faq.a: Yes. A 4-hour charter (e.g. 16:00–20:00) lets you cruise the coast, have drinks, and arrive back at Puerto Banús in time to head to the concert. Tier A boats start at €1,499 for 4 hours.

faq.q: Do you offer any packages that include Starlite tickets?
faq.a: We do not sell Starlite tickets directly. We recommend booking your concert tickets separately, then chartering a boat for the pre-show experience. We can help coordinate transfers from the marina to the venue.

faq.q: Which boats are best for a group of 10–12 going to Starlite?
faq.a: The Azimut 58 Flybridge (12 pax) or Mangusta 80 (12 pax) are excellent choices. Both have spacious decks for sunset drinks. The Mangusta 80 also includes a jet ski for extra fun before the concert.

faq.q: What is the cancellation policy for a Starlite night charter?
faq.a: Standard policy: free cancellation up to 7 days before the charter. Within 7 days, 50% refund. No-shows or same-day cancellations are non-refundable. We recommend checking Starlite’s own policy for concert tickets.

faq.q: Can we have dinner on the boat before the concert?
faq.a: Yes. You can bring your own catering or order from our partner restaurants (delivered to the boat). The charter includes drinks and light snacks, but a full dinner can be arranged on request – just let us know 48 hours ahead.

faq.q: Is it possible to watch the concert from the boat?
faq.a: No – the Starlite venue is inland (Cantera de Nagüeles), not on the coast. The boat is for the pre-concert experience. You’ll need to transfer to the venue for the actual concert.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht for Starlite 2028?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp or the enquiry form on our site. Specify the date, number of guests, and preferred boat. We’ll confirm availability and send a booking link with payment details. Early booking is strongly advised.

data.body_html:
Starlite 2028 in Marbella is one of Europe's most exclusive summer concert series, held at the Cantera de Nagüeles amphitheatre under the stars. Combining a private yacht charter from Puerto Banús with a concert night turns the evening into a full VIP experience – sunset cruise, drinks on deck, then a short transfer to the show. This guide covers everything you need to know for a seamless Starlite 2028 Marbella yacht charter.

Why charter a yacht for Starlite 2028?

A Starlite concert night typically starts late – doors open around 20:00, with headliners on stage from 22:00. That leaves the late afternoon and early evening free. Instead of waiting in a hotel room or a crowded beach club, you can spend those hours on the water. A private yacht charter lets you cruise the Marbella coastline, anchor off Cala del Faro or Cabopino for a swim, and enjoy a glass of cava as the sun sets behind La Concha. Then you simply dock back at Puerto Banús and take a 10-minute taxi to the venue.

Our fleet for Starlite nights

We operate a range of boats from Puerto Banús, suitable for couples, small groups, and larger parties. All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%). Below are the most popular choices for concert-goers.

Budget-friendly options (up to 11 guests)

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – €749 for 2 hours, €2,299 for 8 hours. Ideal for couples or small groups.
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) – same pricing. A sporty flybridge with good deck space.
  • Pershing 46 (14m, 10 pax) – pricing on request. Faster, more modern design.

Premium choices (12 guests)

  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – €4,719 minimum 4 hours, includes a jet ski. Huge sun deck, great for groups.
  • Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) – pricing on request. Spacious flybridge with panoramic views.
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – pricing on request. The ultimate luxury experience.

For the full fleet, see our Marbella yacht charter page.

Sample itinerary: Starlite concert night

A typical Starlite charter runs 4–6 hours. Here’s a suggested timeline:

  • 16:00 – Board at Puerto Banús. Welcome drink and safety briefing.
  • 16:30 – Cruise east towards Marbella Marina and Cabopino. Anchor for a swim at Cala Cortés.
  • 18:00 – Sunset drinks on deck. Snacks served. Head back towards Puerto Banús.
  • 19:30 – Dock at Puerto Banús. Disembark and take a taxi to Cantera de Nagüeles (10 min).
  • 20:00 – Arrive at Starlite for pre-show dinner or drinks at the venue.
  • 22:00 – Concert begins.

If you want a longer evening, choose an 8-hour charter and enjoy a late return after the concert.

Logistics: Getting from the boat to the concert

Puerto Banús is about 6 km from the Starlite venue. Taxis are readily available at the marina – the fare is roughly €10–15. We can also arrange a private transfer for groups (€30–50 depending on vehicle). The venue has ample parking if you prefer to drive, but we recommend a taxi so you can enjoy the drinks on the boat.

What to bring and what to wear

Starlite is a smart-casual event – think summer dresses, linen shirts, and comfortable shoes (the amphitheatre is on a slope). On the boat, bring swimwear, sunscreen, a towel, and a light jacket for the evening breeze. The boat will have a cooler with drinks, but you’re welcome to bring your own wine or champagne (no corkage fee).

Booking tips for Starlite 2028

Starlite announces its lineup in early 2028. Once the dates are confirmed, book both concert tickets and the yacht charter as early as possible. Headline acts sell out quickly, and our fleet books up for Starlite weekends. For the best availability, contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date and group size. We’ll recommend the right boat and send a secure booking link.

Frequently asked questions

How far is Puerto Banús from the Starlite venue?

Puerto Banús is about 6 km from Cantera de Nagüeles, roughly 10–15 minutes by taxi or private transfer. Most charter boats dock at Puerto Banús, so you can enjoy a sunset cruise, then take a short ride to the concert.

Can I charter a boat just for the afternoon before a Starlite concert?

Yes. A 4-hour charter (e.g. 16:00–20:00) lets you cruise the coast, have drinks, and arrive back at Puerto Banús in time to head to the concert. Tier A boats start at €1,499 for 4 hours.

Do you offer any packages that include Starlite tickets?

We do not sell Starlite tickets directly. We recommend booking your concert tickets separately, then chartering a boat for the pre-show experience. We can help coordinate transfers from the marina to the venue.

Which boats are best for a group of 10–12 going to Starlite?

The Azimut 58 Flybridge (12 pax) or Mangusta 80 (12 pax) are excellent choices. Both have spacious decks for sunset drinks. The Mangusta 80 also includes a jet ski for extra fun before the concert.

What is the cancellation policy for a Starlite night charter?

Standard policy: free cancellation up to 7 days before the charter. Within 7 days, 50% refund. No-shows or same-day cancellations are non-refundable. We recommend checking Starlite’s own policy for concert tickets.

Can we have dinner on the boat before the concert?

Yes. You can bring your own catering or order from our partner restaurants (delivered to the boat). The charter includes drinks and light snacks, but a full dinner can be arranged on request – just let us know 48 hours ahead.

Is it possible to watch the concert from the boat?

No – the Starlite venue is inland (Cantera de Nagüeles), not on the coast. The boat is for the pre-concert experience. You’ll need to transfer to the venue for the actual concert.

How do I book a yacht for Starlite 2028?

Contact us via WhatsApp or the enquiry form on our site. Specify the date, number of guests, and preferred boat. We’ll confirm availability and send a booking link with payment details. Early booking is strongly advised.
